title: February 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 13''' is the 44th day of the year. There are 321 days remaining, 322 in leap years.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Caroline Blakiston]] is born.
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Tom Jung]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Pernilla August]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[John Whitman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Kelly Hu]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[JB Blanc]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 103|''Star Wars Weekly'' 103]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 5|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 5]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' released.
*2002 – [[Starfighter: Crossbones 2|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 2]] published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 7|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 7]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2009]] – "[[Blue Shadow Virus (episode)|Blue Shadow Virus]]" and "[[Mystery of a Thousand Moons]]" air on [[Cartoon Network]] in a 1-hour special.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Valley]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*2009 – [[Disney XD]] is launched.
*[[2010]] – [[Gareth Wigan]] dies.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 2|''Star Wars'' (2013) 2]] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[One Night in the Dealer's Den]]'' released on '''swtor.com'''.
*[[2019]] – [[Han Solo - Imperial Cadet 4|''Han Solo - Imperial Cadet'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Republic - Count Dooku 1|''Age of Republic - Count Dooku'' 1]] published.
